Case Studies

Real Clients.
Real Numbers.

No vanity metrics. Every case study below shows the exact problem we walked into, what we built, and the number that moved because of it.

🏦
Financial Services Digital Transformation

50% Digital Performance Uplift for a Global Asset Manager

A 70+ product asset manager had 400+ global sales teams with no centralised platform. We rebuilt the digital infrastructure connecting marketing and sales end to end.

+50%
Digital performance uplift
70+
Products marketed
400+
Sales teams enabled

AI Strategy Cybersecurity SaaS

From Fragmented AI Initiatives to $1.2M in Attributable Pipeline

A cybersecurity SaaS firm was running disconnected AI initiatives across MEA and APAC. We unified them into one AI strategy with a shared intelligence layer.

+35%
Pipeline lead growth
+25%
Revenue ROI improvement
$1.2M
Attributable pipeline
Read case study →
🌍
Professional Services AI Digital Strategy

From Fragmented Campaigns to 1,000+ Leads/Month Across 4 Global Regions

An international franchise group had disconnected campaigns across the US, Europe, LATAM and MENA. We unified their GTM strategy into one system.

1,000+
Qualified leads/month
€250K
Monthly budget managed
+25%
Lead nurturing improvement

🛒
Retail Agentic AI Implementation

How a Regional Retail Group Went From Zero AI to 3 Automated Workflows in 60 Days

Order fulfilment, customer communication and inventory tracking were fully manual. We deployed 3 agentic AI workflows with ROI visible in month one.

60
Days to go-live
3
Workflows automated
14 hrs
Saved per week
